name: Block Elevated-Risk Countries
description: Extends the high-risk list with additional countries that are frequent sources of brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, and malicious scanning. Apply if your services are region-specific and don't need global access.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: Block Elevated-Risk Countries
rules.notes: Extended list including countries with high volumes of brute-force, scanning, and botnet activity.
